name: Darjeeling Hill Station Tour
description: Experience the Queen of Hills with our Darjeeling tour package from Kolkata. Enjoy breathtaking Himalayan views, the iconic toy train ride, sunrise at Tiger Hill, lush tea gardens, and the vibrant culture of this beautiful hill station.

itinerary.title: Kolkata to Darjeeling
itinerary.details: Early morning pickup from Kolkata. Drive through scenic NH12 via Siliguri. Arrive Darjeeling by evening. Check into hotel. Evening free to explore Mall Road and Chowrasta.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling Sightseeing
itinerary.details: Early morning visit to Tiger Hill for sunrise over Kanchenjunga. Visit Batasia Loop, War Memorial, Ghoom Monastery, Darjeeling Himalayan Railway Museum. Afternoon visit Peace Pagoda, Padmaja Naidu Zoo, Tea Garden. Evening explore local market.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling to Kolkata
itinerary.details: After breakfast, visit Rock Garden and Ganga Maya Park. Start return journey to Kolkata via Siliguri. Drop at your Kolkata address by evening.

name: Puri & Konark Temple Tour
description: Visit the sacred Jagannath Temple in Puri and the magnificent Konark Sun Temple (UNESCO World Heritage Site). Enjoy pristine beaches, ancient architecture, and the spiritual essence of Odisha on this tour package from Kolkata.

itinerary.title: Kolkata to Puri
itinerary.details: Early morning pickup from Kolkata. Drive via NH16 through scenic coastal route. Arrive Puri by afternoon. Visit Jagannath Temple, Puri Beach. Evening explore Swargadwar Beach and local market.

itinerary.title: Konark & Return
itinerary.details: Morning visit Konark Sun Temple (UNESCO World Heritage). Visit Chandrabhaga Beach, Raghurajpur Art Village. Start return journey to Kolkata. Drop by late evening.

name: Sundarbans Mangrove Safari Tour
description: Explore the world's largest mangrove forest and home of the Royal Bengal Tiger. Our Sundarbans tour includes a thrilling boat safari through the dense mangroves, bird watching, and a chance to spot wildlife in their natural habitat.

itinerary.title: Kolkata to Sundarbans
itinerary.details: Morning pickup from Kolkata. Drive to Godkhali jetty (approx 3 hours). Board boat for Sundarbans. Visit Sajnekhali Watch Tower, Mangrove Forest walk. Afternoon boat ride through creeks. Overnight stay at Sundarbans eco resort.

itinerary.title: Safari & Return
itinerary.details: Early morning boat safari to spot Royal Bengal Tiger, Crocodiles, and various bird species. Visit Sudhanyakhali Watch Tower. After lunch, return boat ride to Godkhali. Drive back to Kolkata by evening.

name: Varanasi & Ayodhya Spiritual Tour
description: Experience the spiritual essence of India with our Varanasi and Ayodhya tour. Witness the mesmerizing Ganga Aarti, visit the sacred Kashi Vishwanath Temple, explore the newly built Ram Mandir in Ayodhya, and discover the birthplace of Buddhism at Sarnath.

itinerary.title: Kolkata to Varanasi
itinerary.details: Early morning departure from Kolkata. Drive via NH19 through scenic Bihar plains. Arrive Varanasi by evening. Witness the spectacular Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat. Evening walk through the ancient lanes of Varanasi.

itinerary.title: Varanasi Sightseeing & Ayodhya
itinerary.details: Early morning boat ride on the Ganges (sunrise). Visit Kashi Vishwanath Temple, Annapurna Temple, Sarnath (Buddhist site). After lunch, drive to Ayodhya (4-5 hrs). Evening Saryu River Aarti.

itinerary.title: Ayodhya & Return
itinerary.details: Morning visit Ram Mandir, Hanuman Garhi, Ram Ki Paidi. Start return journey to Kolkata. Drop by late evening.

name: Bodh Gaya & Rajgir Buddhist Circuit Tour
description: Explore the sacred Buddhist circuit of Bihar. Visit the UNESCO World Heritage Mahabodhi Temple where Lord Buddha attained enlightenment, the ancient ruins of Nalanda University, and the historic city of Rajgir with its hot springs and Griddhakuta Peak.

itinerary.title: Patna to Bodh Gaya
itinerary.details: Morning pickup from Patna. Drive to Bodh Gaya (2-3 hrs). Visit Mahabodhi Temple, Bodhi Tree, Great Buddha Statue, Thai Temple, Japanese Temple, Tibetan Monastery. Evening meditation session.

itinerary.title: Rajgir, Nalanda & Return
itinerary.details: Morning drive to Rajgir. Visit Hot Springs, Griddhakuta Peak (ropeway), Japanese Peace Pagoda, Venuvan. Drive to Nalanda — visit ancient university ruins and museum. Return to Patna by evening.

name: Deoghar Baidyanath Dham Pilgrimage Tour
description: Visit one of the twelve Jyotirlingas — Baidyanath Dham in Deoghar. This sacred pilgrimage tour from Ranchi covers the main temple, nearby Basukinath, and scenic attractions around Deoghar for a spiritually enriching experience.

itinerary.title: Ranchi to Deoghar
itinerary.details: Morning pickup from Ranchi. Drive to Deoghar via Dumka road (5-6 hrs). Arrive Deoghar, visit Baidyanath Dham Temple for darshan. Evening visit Naulakha Mandir and Nandan Pahar. Overnight stay in Deoghar.

itinerary.title: Basukinath & Return
itinerary.details: Early morning visit Basukinath Temple (30 km from Deoghar). Return to Deoghar, visit Tapovan Hills and local market. After lunch, drive back to Ranchi. Drop by evening.

name: Kolkata Heritage City Tour
description: Discover the City of Joy with our comprehensive Kolkata heritage city tour. Visit iconic landmarks including Victoria Memorial, Howrah Bridge, Dakshineswar Temple, Indian Museum, and experience the vibrant culture, street food, and colonial architecture of Kolkata.

itinerary.title: Full Day Kolkata Sightseeing
itinerary.details: Morning pickup from your location. Visit Dakshineswar Kali Temple, Belur Math. Drive across Howrah Bridge. Visit Marble Palace, Indian Museum. Lunch break at Park Street. Afternoon visit Victoria Memorial, St. Paul's Cathedral, Kalighat Temple. Evening visit Science City or Prinsep Ghat for sunset. Drop back by evening.

name: North Bengal Complete Tour
description: The ultimate North Bengal and Sikkim experience! This 5-day tour covers the best of Darjeeling hill station, vibrant Gangtok with its lakes and monasteries, and the wildlife-rich Dooars region with jungle safaris. Perfect for families and nature lovers.

itinerary.title: Kolkata to Siliguri/Darjeeling
itinerary.details: Early morning departure from Kolkata. Drive via NH12 to Siliguri. Continue to Darjeeling (total 10-12 hrs). Evening free to explore Mall Road. Overnight in Darjeeling.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling Sightseeing
itinerary.details: Early morning Tiger Hill for sunrise. Visit Batasia Loop, Ghoom Monastery, Toy Train ride, Peace Pagoda, Tea Garden. Afternoon Padmaja Naidu Zoo, Himalayan Mountaineering Institute. Overnight in Darjeeling.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling to Gangtok
itinerary.details: Morning drive to Gangtok (4-5 hrs) via Teesta River valley. Afternoon explore MG Marg, Enchey Monastery, Gangtok Ropeway. Evening explore local market. Overnight in Gangtok.

itinerary.title: Gangtok Sightseeing & to Dooars
itinerary.details: Morning excursion to Tsomgo Lake and Baba Mandir (if permits available). Return to Gangtok. Afternoon drive to Dooars/Lataguri (5-6 hrs). Overnight in Dooars.

itinerary.title: Dooars Safari & Return
itinerary.details: Early morning jungle safari in Jaldapara/Gorumara National Park. Visit Chapramari Wildlife area. After lunch, drive to Siliguri, then return to Kolkata. Drop by late evening.

name: Dehradun Mussoorie Weekend Tour
description: Escape to the Queen of Hills — Mussoorie. This 2-day weekend trip from Delhi covers the best of Dehradun and Mussoorie with comfortable cab service.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Mussoorie
itinerary.details: Morning pickup from Delhi, drive to Mussoorie via Dehradun. Visit Sahastradhara, then proceed to Mussoorie. Evening walk on Mall Road.

itinerary.title: Mussoorie Sightseeing & Return
itinerary.details: Visit Kempty Falls, Gun Hill, Company Garden. After lunch, drive back to Delhi.

name: Nainital Lake Tour
description: Explore the jewel of Kumaon — Nainital. A 3-day tour from Delhi covering lake boating, hill views, and local sightseeing.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Nainital
itinerary.details: Morning departure from Delhi, arrive Nainital by evening. Check in and evening boating on Naini Lake.

itinerary.title: Nainital Sightseeing
itinerary.details: Full day sightseeing — Snow View Point, Tiffin Top, Naina Devi Temple, Mall Road shopping.

itinerary.title: Return to Delhi
itinerary.details: After breakfast, visit Bhimtal/Sattal enroute, drive back to Delhi.

name: Jim Corbett Safari Tour
description: Experience the thrill of spotting Bengal tigers at Jim Corbett National Park. Weekend safari tour from Delhi with comfortable cab service.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Jim Corbett
itinerary.details: Early morning drive to Jim Corbett. Check in, afternoon safari in Bijrani/Jhirna zone.

itinerary.title: Safari & Return
itinerary.details: Morning safari, visit Corbett Museum and Garjia Temple, drive back to Delhi.

name: Agra Taj Mahal Day Tour
description: Same-day Agra tour from Delhi to see the Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, and other Mughal monuments. Round trip cab with professional driver.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra & Return
itinerary.details: Early morning drive via Yamuna Expressway. Visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri. Return to Delhi by evening.

name: Varanasi Ayodhya Pilgrimage Tour
description: Complete pilgrimage tour covering Varanasi's ghats, Kashi Vishwanath Temple, Sarnath, and the sacred city of Ayodhya with Ram Mandir.

itinerary.title: Kolkata to Varanasi
itinerary.details: Drive from Kolkata to Varanasi. Evening Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat.

itinerary.title: Varanasi Sightseeing
itinerary.details: Visit Kashi Vishwanath, Sarnath, Ramnagar Fort, boat ride on Ganga.

itinerary.title: Varanasi to Ayodhya
itinerary.details: Drive to Ayodhya. Visit Ram Mandir, Hanuman Garhi, Kanak Bhawan.

itinerary.title: Return to Kolkata
itinerary.details: After darshan, drive back to Kolkata.

name: Khajuraho Temple Tour
description: Visit the UNESCO World Heritage Khajuraho temples with this 3-day tour from Kolkata. Marvel at the intricate medieval sculptures and explore nearby Panna.

itinerary.title: Kolkata to Khajuraho
itinerary.details: Long drive to Khajuraho via Varanasi route. Overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Khajuraho Sightseeing
itinerary.details: Full day temple tour — Western, Eastern, and Southern temple groups. Visit Raneh Falls.

itinerary.title: Return to Kolkata
itinerary.details: Visit Panna National Park if time permits, drive back.

name: Golden Triangle Tour (Delhi-Agra-Jaipur)
description: The classic Golden Triangle tour covering Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur — India's most iconic heritage circuit with comfortable cab service.

itinerary.title: Delhi Sightseeing
itinerary.details: Visit Red Fort, India Gate, Qutub Minar, Humayun's Tomb, Lotus Temple.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra
itinerary.details: Drive to Agra via Yamuna Expressway. Visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort.

itinerary.title: Agra to Jaipur
itinerary.details: Drive to Jaipur via Fatehpur Sikri. Visit Hawa Mahal, City Palace.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Delhi
itinerary.details: Morning visit to Amber Fort, Nahargarh Fort. Drive back to Delhi.

name: Bhopal Sanchi Pachmarhi Tour
description: Explore the heart of India — Bhopal, ancient Sanchi, and the beautiful hill station of Pachmarhi in this 3-day cab tour.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Bhopal
itinerary.details: Drive to Bhopal. Visit Upper Lake, Taj-ul-Masajid.

itinerary.title: Sanchi & Pachmarhi
itinerary.details: Morning visit to Sanchi Stupa, then drive to Pachmarhi. Visit Bee Falls.

itinerary.title: Return to Delhi
itinerary.details: Morning sightseeing in Pachmarhi, drive back to corridor.

name: Haridwar Rishikesh Spiritual Tour
description: Weekend spiritual getaway to the holy cities of Haridwar and Rishikesh. Experience the divine Ganga Aarti and yoga capital of the world.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Haridwar
itinerary.details: Morning drive to Haridwar. Visit Har Ki Pauri, Mansa Devi. Evening Ganga Aarti.

itinerary.title: Rishikesh & Return
itinerary.details: Drive to Rishikesh. Visit Laxman Jhula, Ram Jhula, Beatles Ashram. Return to Delhi.

name: Kolkata Beach Tour (Digha-Mandarmani)
description: Weekend beach getaway from Kolkata to Digha and Mandarmani — enjoy sunrise, seafood, and long red crab beaches.

itinerary.title: Kolkata to Digha & Mandarmani
itinerary.details: Morning drive to Digha. Beach time, visit Chandaneswar Temple. Drive to Mandarmani for overnight.

itinerary.title: Mandarmani & Return
itinerary.details: Morning beach walk at Mandarmani. Visit Shankarpur fishing village. Return to Kolkata.

name: Patna Rajgir Nalanda Heritage Tour
description: Explore ancient Bihar — visit the ruins of Nalanda University, Rajgir's hot springs, and Pawapuri's Jal Mandir on this heritage tour.

itinerary.title: Patna to Rajgir via Nalanda
itinerary.details: Visit Bihar Museum, drive to Nalanda University ruins, then Rajgir. Hot springs, Vulture Peak.

itinerary.title: Pawapuri & Return
itinerary.details: Visit Pawapuri Jal Mandir, Son Bhandar caves. Return to Patna.

name: Ranchi Netarhat Hill Station Tour
description: Visit the Queen of Chhotanagpur — Netarhat hill station from Ranchi. Enjoy stunning sunrise views and lush forests.

itinerary.title: Ranchi to Netarhat
itinerary.details: Morning drive to Netarhat. Visit Magnolia Point, Upper Ghagri Falls. Evening sunset.

itinerary.title: Sunrise & Return
itinerary.details: Early morning sunrise at Netarhat viewpoint. Visit Betla National Park enroute. Return to Ranchi.
